html: Strix Halo user here. While Qwen 3.6 27B exhibits remarkable intelligence density, I will still take unsloth's dynamic IQ2_XXS of Minimax M2.7 over Q8_0 Qwen 3.6 27B any day of the week, and this isn't just because of generation speed either. I wrote my own custom harness, and I get hallucinated tool call parameters and bizarre invocations with Q3.6 27B even at Q8_0, but no issues with the IQ2_XXS of M2.7.
